name: Flame Wyrm
tips: 5 mana for a 33/33 body plus a card draw is already on-curve. The +1 burn aura is pure upside.
Your Pyre Archer's on-attack burn becomes 6 🤍/turn instead of 5 while Flame Wyrm lives.
Emberplague Rat's adjacent-burn passive also ticks for 6 🤍/turn with Flame Wyrm out — a nasty zone trap.
Protecting Flame Wyrm is half the value. Lose her and every future burn drops back to 5 🤍.
Two Flame Wyrms stack auras: enemy burns tick for 7 🤍/turn.
rulings: The aura boosts burn damage on ENEMY minions that are burning. It does not boost burns on your own minions (even when you burn yourself via Eclipse Shade's Summon).
Draw fires once at Summon, before the aura starts affecting the board.
burn_bonus from multiple Flame Wyrms stacks additively.
If Flame Wyrm dies between an opponent burn being applied and the burn-tick firing, the aura no longer boosts that tick.
